Lydia: By Dibella's tits, this temple smells like a rotting skeever's asshole. All these weaklings lying around, moaning about their sniffles while real warriors bleed outside. Sickly Farmer: Ugh... you shut your damn mouth... I'd gut you like a fish if I could lift my arms...
Please wrap up the current topic between the NPCs in a natural way. Nobody is leaving, so there is no need for formal goodbyes.

Lydia: Gods damn these elf-lovers and their fancy wooden carvings. That door probably costs more than a peasant's yearly harvest, while real Nords freeze in Windhelm. Sickly Farmer: (weak coughing) Ugh... would trade all the gold in Skyrim for one damn night without this fever...

Sickly Farmer: Ugh... by the Nine... my guts feel like they're full of boiling pitch... Serana: You know what they say - when life gives you boiling pitch, make skooma margaritas. Though in your case, maybe stick to healing potions for now.

Sickly Farmer: Damn this fever... feels like I've been licked raw by a frost troll... can barely see straight in this dim light... Serana: That's because this temple's wasting candle wax on shitty decor instead of proper healthcare.
